description: Lock self_replicating_systems to broad artificial machine, robotic, and synthetic-organism self-replication rather than molecular-assembler-only universal construction.

checks.reason: Nanotechnology remains a plausible substrate for artificial self-replication research.
The node includes synthetic organisms capable of reproduction.
AI and automation are part of designing and controlling forecast self-replicating systems.
Machine self-replication includes robotic and automated manufacturing lineages.
Molecular assemblers are a narrower implementation path, not a prerequisite for broad self-replicating systems.
